# Project Reference - backend-csharp

> **IMPORTANT:** These are summaries. READ the full doc file when working in the matching context.

## [Backend Patterns Reference](../../docs/project-reference/backend-patterns-reference.md)

**Summary:** Canonical Easy.Platform backend conventions with `file:line` evidence — entities (`RootAuditedEntity`, `[ComputedEntityProperty]`, static `Expression` filters), repository pattern, CQRS command/query handlers, `PlatformValidationResult` fluent validation (never throw), DTO-owned mapping, entity event handlers for side effects (`UseCaseEvents/`), RabbitMQ message bus, and background jobs.

> **READ** `docs/project-reference/backend-patterns-reference.md` when: Writing or modifying any backend code — CQRS commands/queries, entities, repositories, validation, DTOs, event handlers, message bus, migrations, or background jobs.

## [Domain Entities Reference](../../docs/project-reference/domain-entities-reference.md)

**Summary:** Evidence-cited map of the TextSnippet domain model — entity base-class hierarchy (`RootEntity`/`RootAuditedEntity`/`IRowVersionEntity`), entity catalog, relationships, aggregate boundaries, DTO mapping ownership (`PlatformEntityDto.MapToEntity()`), value objects (`PlatformValueObject<T>.Validate()`), cross-service entity map via message bus, persistence, and frontend data models.

> **READ** `docs/project-reference/domain-entities-reference.md` when: Designing or changing domain entities, value objects, aggregates, DTO mapping, or entity relationships; verifying correct base classes and mapping ownership before generating code.
